title: Cozy Turkish Scamorza Wrap
description: A comforting keto-friendly Turkish-inspired dish featuring melted scamorza cheese, wrapped in a leaf and steamed.
instructions: In a small pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chopped parsley and mint, and sauté for another minute.
Add the scamorza cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Lay a large leaf on a clean surface, and place a portion of the scamorza mixture in the center.
Add a dollop of butter on top of the cheese mixture.
Fold the leaf over the cheese, and then fold in the sides to form a tight package.
Steam the leaf-wrapped scamorza for 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the leaf is tender.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley and mint if desired.
